headline: Alphabet joins the Dow, replacing Verizon
detail: Alphabet's addition to the Dow signals index-level validation of mega-cap tech dominance. This is a mild sentiment tailwind for your QQQ and SPY holdings, and broadly supportive of the tech-heavy tilt in your book.

headline: Defense stocks plummet on Germany scrapping warships
detail: Rheinmetall dropped 18% on the news, dragging defense names broadly. You have no direct defense exposure, but sharp sector selloffs can spook risk appetite and weigh on high-beta tech and growth names like PLTR and CRWD.
